global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a clear focus on discounts and product offerings.
global.main_message: Promoting a sale with user-generated content and a clear call to action.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A smooth orange gradient fills the background, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: VantaStyle logo
elements.description: A simple, modern logo with the text 'VantaStyle' displayed prominently at the top.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: A rectangular area showcasing three stylized product images, resembling sleek, modern items.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon positioned near the product display, adding a decorative touch.

elements.label: Additional product icon
elements.description: Another circular icon similar to the previous one, enhancing the visual appeal.

elements.label: Stylized element
elements.description: A stylized graphic element that adds depth and interest to the center of the ad.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' indicating user-generated content, positioned at the top left.

elements.label: Additional decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element that complements the overall design, located at the bottom left.

elements.label: Discount headline
elements.description: A bold text area stating 'Up to 40% off Shop bestsellers now', designed to grab attention.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Shop bestsellers now

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Book now' in a contrasting color, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A clear price tag showing '€29.99', positioned near the call to action for easy visibility.

elements.label: UGC tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' indicating user-generated content, positioned at the top left.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, VantaStyle logo, discount headline, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the product display, with the headline in the center and the CTA at the bottom.
